title: pericallis malvifolia
intro: Pericallis malvifolia, also known as the 'Velvet Plant', is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family of Asteraceae. It is native to the Canary Islands and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions like acne and eczema. Pericallis malvifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its potential healing properties.
